reasoning: The ISO27001 A.5.15 control focuses on access control, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC mechanisms. Kubernetes RBAC allows for fine-grained permissions management similar to IAM roles and policies in cloud environments. The functions generated address key aspects of access control: avoiding excessive privileges (no cluster-admin binding), enforcing least privilege, managing service account tokens, and configuring OIDC for authentication, which can be analogous to MFA in cloud environments.
title: Access Control
